title: Klasea oligocephala
intro: Klasea oligocephala, also known as Kuo Shen, is a plant species used in traditional Chinese medicine. It is valued for its purported health benefits, including the treatment of respiratory issues, fever reduction, and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Klasea oligocephala include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal decoctions, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions in Chinese medicine.
taxonomy: Klasea oligocephala is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is native to Europe. As a member of the Brassicaceae family, Klasea oligocephala is classified within the kingdom Plantae. The exact classification within the plant kingdom may be more specific, but it is generally placed in the following hierarchy: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Rosids, Order: Brassicales, Family: Brassicaceae, Genus: Klasea, Species: K. oligocephala.
